---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the SADAD PHP SDK
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem or Motivation
Describe the problem or use case that this feature would address. Why is this feature needed?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you would like. How should this feature work? Include any API design ideas or code examples if applicable.

```php
// Example of how the feature might be used
```

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they are insufficient.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
